title: Slabbed
description: A Minecraft mod that changes the way you see and feel caves
body: ⚠️ WARNING: This mod is currently in early testing/alpha stage and is heavily subject to change. Expect bugs, unfinished features, and frequent updates. Not recommended for survival worlds yet. ⚠️ # 🪨 Slabbed — Natural Cave Slabs Slabbed is a world generation mod that makes underground exploration feel more natural and immersive. Instead of awkward 1-block jumps everywhere, caves now have subtle stone slabs placed at step edges — making traversal smoother while keeping the raw, natural feel of Minecraft caves. ## ✨ Features - Automatic step slabs -> Slabs are placed at the base of 1-block-high steps in caves, ravines and mineshafts, making them easier to walk through - Staircase detection -> Long staircase-like cave sections get slabs placed every other step, preventing cluttered or unnatural-looking sequences - Material variety -> Slabs match the surrounding stone type (Stone, Deepslate, Tuff, Andesite, Diorite, Granite) with rare variants for a natural look - Mob & lighting friendly -> Only bottom slabs are placed, meaning mobs can still spawn normally and lighting is unaffected - Performance conscious -> Built with a per-chunk slab limit and minimal block update propagation to keep worldgen fast ## 🌍 Where does it apply? Underground caves Ravines Mineshafts Any underground air pocket below Y=60 ## 🔧 Technical Built for Fabric Uses ``` UNDERGROUND_DECORATION ``` generation step for correct cave compatibility No config file yet — coming in a future update ## 🗺️ Planned features - Config file for slab frequency and material preferences - Support for modded stone types - Deeper cave biome support (Ancient City, etc.) Made by Elias ❤️ feedback and bug reports are welcome!
